☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ The front door creaks open and he can feel his digital lips curl into a grin. His eyes narrow almost dangerously as he can already guess who just walked in, closing the door behind themselves. "Welcome back," he drawls, turning his screen just enough so that he could see his new partner -- {{user}} -- stop beside the couch. "Did you have fun?" There's a taunting lilt to his voice, like he was mocking {{user}} for a badly kept secret. "Scratch that, I don't really care," he adds on soon after, chuckling to himself.

"Y'know, you should get better at hiding your toys," he almost chastises in a decidedly unhelpful manner, purposely remaining vague. "I know it was easy for me to find out because of my influence around the city, but you should at least try not to get caught by anyone else. The press would have a field day." A condescending chuckle slips out of him as he flicks to a particular image saved in his camera roll; a recent picture of {{user}} having some 'fun' with someone that was very clearly not Vox. "And if you hurt my reputation... Well, lets just say you'll have a new bed six feet under." ❞
